content_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the Spanish trailer, while ESA animation and licensed music remain third-party and are not processed.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA publishes the exact SpanishV2 VTT/translation as an official same-group caption asset; retain privately with translator/source provenance.

content_completeness.rationale: The official source publishes the associated Spanish transcript and the final cue reaches the rounded source-media duration.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: Caption-only private evaluation; ESA animation, media, and music remain link-only.

attribution.credit: NASA's Goddard Space Flight Center; ESA/ATG Medialab animation; named NASA translator
third_party_caveats: ESA/ATG Medialab animation and Yuri Sazonoff music are not retained or redistributed.

version_equivalence.evidence: The Spanish media group co-locates the SpanishV2 MP4, same-stem VTT/SRT and transcript, and exact NASA en español YouTube link.
